title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
